headline: Energous shares are trading higher after the company announced continued commercial momentum across its enterprise customer base, including expanding deployments with its two Fortune 10 customers, and a growing proof-of-concept pipeline spanning multiple industries and geographies.

headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones Roars As Industrials Rescue Wall Street From Meta-Led Tech Slide
summary: A sharp rotation gripped Wall Street at midday Thursday as blue-chip industrials and healthcare powered the Dow higher, masking a savage selloff in mega-cap tech after Meta and Microsoft warned on AI infrastructure spending.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To EMCOR Group (EME) Raised 2026 Guidance On AI Data Center Demand
summary: EMCOR Group reported past first-quarter 2026 results with sales of US$4,628.23 million and net income of US$305.48 million, alongside higher earnings per share year over year. Management also raised full-year 2026 revenue and earnings guidance, pointing to strong demand in AI-driven data center and network infrastructure projects.
